leadText: The Sea Incense (Japanese: うしおのおこう Seawater Incense) is a type of held item introduced in Generation III. Prior to Generation IX, it was an incense that allowed Marill and Azumarill to produce Azurill Eggs. In battle, its effect is identical to the Mystic Water.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Contents 1 Effect 1.1 In battle 1.1.1 Generation III 1.1.2 Generation IV onward 1.2 Outside of battle Effect [ edit | edit source ] In battle [ edit | edit source ] Generation III [ edit | edit source ] Boosts the power of the holder's Water-type moves by 5%. Generation IV onward [ edit | edit source ] Boosts the power of the holder's Water-type moves by 20%. Outside of battle [ edit | edit source ] If held by either parent of a pairing in Pokémon Day Care or the Pokémon Nursery that would produce a Marill Egg , an Azurill Egg is produced instead.

sections.title: In battle
sections.text: In battle [ edit | edit source ] Generation III [ edit | edit source ] Boosts the power of the holder's Water-type moves by 5%. Generation IV onward [ edit | edit source ] Boosts the power of the holder's Water-type moves by 20%.
